Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 20201 0 0}{f 5 21 1 101}What can I help you with today?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 101}Can I help you with anything else?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 20205 0 0}{f 5 21 1 101}Thank you for stopping by. Please come again.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 101}It's our grand opening! We look forward to doing business with you![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 101}Oh! Did you bring a flyer? Wonderful. Here's a gift for you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 101}We also offer a service for growing vegetables on your behalf. Let us know if you're interested![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 101}Since you've been such a loyal customer, we've gone ahead and upgraded our seed-growing service for you![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The shop can now grow an additional plot of seeds.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 20204 0 0}{f 5 21 1 101}We'll take good care of them. Please stop by again another day.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 101}Your seeds from the other day have grown splendidly! Here you are.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 101}It looks like they still need more time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 101}It looks like they'll be ready soon.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 101}It doesn't look like you're carrying any seeds.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 101}We have a nice selection of seeds here, so do consider buying some from us![n]{f 1 1}
